skill-installer.manual_fallback: Use raw `npx skills add` installation commands.

test-audit-pipeline.manual_fallback: Perform a manual test audit with explicit deterministic checks.

test-quality-assurance.manual_fallback: Review test quality manually when the TDD rubric skill is unavailable.

test-redundancy-triage.manual_fallback: Identify redundant tests manually by structural review and deselection.

code-health-audit-pipeline.manual_fallback: Install repo-audit-skills v0.3.0+ (github.com/jc1122/repo-audit-skills, `node bin/install-repo-audit-skills.js --dest <skills-root> --force`), or run the five leaf audits directly.

complexity-audit.manual_fallback: Part of repo-audit-skills v0.3.0+; install via its node installer.

duplication-audit.manual_fallback: Part of repo-audit-skills v0.3.0+; install via its node installer.

dead-code-audit.manual_fallback: Part of repo-audit-skills v0.3.0+; install via its node installer.

structure-audit.manual_fallback: Part of repo-audit-skills v0.3.0+; install via its node installer.

quality-audit.manual_fallback: Part of repo-audit-skills v0.3.0+; install via its node installer.

coverage-gap-audit.manual_fallback: Collect a coverage.py JSON report and assess testedness manually when the leaf is unavailable.

perf-benchmark.manual_fallback: Use manual benchmark discipline with stable commands and fixtures.

perf-optimization.manual_fallback: Optimize manually per the perf-benchmark remediation playbook ratchet.

subagent-driven-development.manual_fallback: Execute batches sequentially in one agent.

verification-before-completion.manual_fallback: Rerun verification manually and record evidence.

hotspot-audit.manual_fallback: Part of repo-audit-skills v0.4.0+; install via its node installer.

dependency-audit.manual_fallback: Part of repo-audit-skills v0.4.0+; install via its node installer.

repo-hygiene-audit.manual_fallback: Part of repo-audit-skills v0.4.0+; install via its node installer.

docs-consistency-audit.manual_fallback: Part of repo-audit-skills v0.4.0+; install via its node installer.

security-audit.manual_fallback: Part of repo-audit-skills v0.4.0+; install via its node installer.

test-effectiveness-audit.manual_fallback: Part of repo-audit-skills v0.4.0+; install via its node installer.

bootstrap.manual_fallback: Use raw Skills CLI commands when helper skills are missing.

test-python.manual_fallback: Run a deterministic manual Python test audit when the skill lane is unavailable.

code-health-python.manual_fallback: Review Python code health manually and record the tooling gap when the deterministic family is unavailable.

coverage-python.manual_fallback: Collect coverage.py JSON and assess testedness manually when the leaf is unavailable.

security.manual_fallback: Perform a manual security review; the bandit-based leaf is unavailable.

performance.manual_fallback: Use manual performance reasoning and stable verification when the preferred skill set is unavailable.

hygiene.manual_fallback: Review repo hygiene manually (tracked artifacts, configs, release files) when the leaf is unavailable.

orchestration.manual_fallback: Run verification manually and execute batches sequentially when orchestration helpers are missing.
